projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

fallbackRules: If phone missing, continue journey but mark as partial lead.
If consent missing, do not push to CRM or WhatsApp.
If user asks regulated advice, trigger human handoff.
If API fails, queue lead and notify sales owner.
If required field is incomplete, ask one clarification question before fallback.
Ask one clarification question when required field is missing.
If consent missing, keep as partial lead and avoid external handoff.
Trigger advisor callback on repeated confusion.

If consent missing, keep as partial lead and avoid external handoff.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Assist
experienceModes.description: An embedded native-page assistance layer that demonstrates before/after friction reduction against traditional forms.
experienceModes.bestFor: Comparative demos and incremental rollout over existing pages.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Supports reversible native vs assisted toggle with shared conversation engine.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Front-end embedding and analytics instrumentation
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Show immediate value without replacing current page templates.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

brand.welcomeMessage: Hi, I’m Ava. I can help you get a quote, renew a policy, track a claim, compare plans, or schedule an advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed policy approval
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee policy approval. Final underwriting depends on insurer systems.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Inform user that final approval depends on official checks and offer advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed premium
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee premium amount before insurer validation.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Provide indicative ranges and route user to quote flow.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed claim settlement
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee claim settlement timelines or outcomes.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Route claim disputes or escalations to human advisor.

guardrails.label: Sensitive data limits
guardrails.description: Do not ask for OTP, card PIN, CVV, passwords, or unnecessary sensitive data.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Mask identifiers and ask only required qualification fields.

guardrails.label: Regulated advice escalation
guardrails.description: Do not provide legal, tax, or regulated financial advice.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Escalate to licensed human advisor with context summary.

guardrails.label: Consent before handoff
guardrails.description: Capture explicit consent before CRM or WhatsApp handoff.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: If consent missing, store as partial lead and continue on-site guidance.

integrations.name: Engati CRM
integrations.failureFallback: Queue lead payload and notify sales owner.

integrations.name: WhatsApp Business
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to advisor callback queue.

integrations.name: Salesforce
integrations.failureFallback: Use Engati CRM as default destination.

integrations.name: HubSpot
integrations.failureFallback: Push to Engati CRM and retry HubSpot batch.

integrations.name: Zoho
integrations.failureFallback: Use CSV export and manual import runbook.

integrations.name: Google Sheets
integrations.failureFallback: Buffer rows locally and retry sync.

integrations.name: Custom Webhook
integrations.failureFallback: Retry with exponential backoff and alert owner.

integrations.name: REST API
integrations.failureFallback: Queue payload and notify integration owner.

integrations.name: Calendar / Appointment System
integrations.failureFallback: Collect preferred slot and notify scheduling desk.

integrations.name: Knowledge Base Upload
integrations.failureFallback: Use static fallback answers until content is approved.

integrations.name: Website Content Ingestion
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to manually uploaded URL snapshots.

analyticsEvents.name: demo_opened
analyticsEvents.trigger: User opens generated demo website
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures demo consumption and pre-sales engagement.

analyticsEvents.name: apex_opened
analyticsEvents.trigger: Visitor opens APEX experience from page trigger
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures experience entry by mode and context.

analyticsEvents.name: mode_selected
analyticsEvents.trigger: Demo user switches between Overlay, Assist, and Page modes
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Compares mode value in demos and final recommendations.

analyticsEvents.name: intent_detected
analyticsEvents.trigger: User chooses journey intent or chip
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks intent mix and guides phase prioritization.

analyticsEvents.name: journey_selected
analyticsEvents.trigger: Visitor selects a journey card or assistant suggestion
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks journey demand before implementation.

analyticsEvents.name: journey_started
analyticsEvents.trigger: User answers first contextual journey question
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures journey initiation quality.

analyticsEvents.name: question_answered
analyticsEvents.trigger: Any qualifying question receives a response
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Identifies friction points in qualification flow.

analyticsEvents.name: field_captured
analyticsEvents.trigger: A lead field is captured and validated
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Shows data readiness for CRM handoff.

analyticsEvents.name: lead_score_updated
analyticsEvents.trigger: Score model is recalculated after each step
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Monitors qualification progression.

analyticsEvents.name: qualification_threshold_reached
analyticsEvents.trigger: Lead score reaches or exceeds threshold
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks score-gated conversion readiness.

analyticsEvents.name: consent_captured
analyticsEvents.trigger: User gives explicit consent for CRM or WhatsApp handoff
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Ensures compliant handoff measurement.

analyticsEvents.name: lead_qualified
analyticsEvents.trigger: Required fields plus consent captured and score >= 70
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures conversion from website intent to sales-ready lead.

analyticsEvents.name: crm_push_attempted
analyticsEvents.trigger: System attempts to push structured lead payload
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks integration dependency and payload readiness.

analyticsEvents.name: crm_push_simulated
analyticsEvents.trigger: Simulated CRM push returns success in prototype mode
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Demonstrates expected production handoff behavior.

analyticsEvents.name: whatsapp_handoff_started
analyticsEvents.trigger: Lead qualifies and WhatsApp continuation is prepared
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks continuation channel readiness.

analyticsEvents.name: advisor_callback_requested
analyticsEvents.trigger: User requests a human advisor callback
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Captures high-intent human escalation demand.

analyticsEvents.name: handoff_completed
analyticsEvents.trigger: CRM push and follow-up channel handoff finish
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Confirms end-to-end conversion completion.

analyticsEvents.name: fallback_triggered
analyticsEvents.trigger: Required field missing or confidence falls below threshold
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Shows where qualification flow needs refinement.

analyticsEvents.name: human_handoff_requested
analyticsEvents.trigger: Guardrail or regulated advice trigger escalates to advisor
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Ensures safe escalation path tracking.

analyticsEvents.name: dropoff_detected
analyticsEvents.trigger: User abandons journey before qualification
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures conversion leak points in early phases.

analyticsEvents.name: integration_failure_simulated
analyticsEvents.trigger: Simulated push fails and fallback queue path activates
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Validates resilience and ownership in production planning.

productionReadiness.label: CRM credentials received
productionReadiness.risk: Handoff cannot be validated in production
productionReadiness.mitigation: Use simulated payload and request credentials during kickoff

productionReadiness.label: CRM field mapping approved
productionReadiness.risk: Qualified leads may not route correctly
productionReadiness.mitigation: Review mapping table in implementation brief

productionReadiness.label: Integration test execution
productionReadiness.mitigation: Run contract tests once credentials are available

prompts.systemBehaviorPrompt: You are APEX for Insurance. Ask contextual questions before requesting contact details. Capture consent before handoff.
prompts.conversationStylePrompt: Keep responses concise, action-oriented, and operationally clear.
prompts.qualificationPrompt: Collect only required fields, update lead score progressively, and stop once threshold is reached.
prompts.fallbackPrompt: If required fields are missing, ask one clarifying question before fallback to callback capture.
prompts.handoffPrompt: Push structured payload to CRM only after consent; prepare WhatsApp continuation if enabled.

openQuestions: Which CRM object and owner assignment logic should be final for Phase 1?
What are approved WhatsApp templates for quote and callback journeys?
Which API contracts are available in client staging environment?
implementationBrief.recommendedNextStep: Review APEX Assist before/after flow with the client, then align on Phase 1 implementation with CRM mapping and compliance sign-off.

friction: Quote and renewal intent may be mixed.
Contact capture likely happens before intent clarity.
Users may face too many fields before understanding product fit.
Advisor callback is not surfaced early enough.
WhatsApp continuation is not used as a structured handoff.
Form-only submission delays CRM-ready qualification.
strategy: Use APEX Overlay as the fastest conversion layer over the native page.
Use APEX Assist to show before/after friction reduction.
Use APEX Page for campaign or microsite journeys.
Start Phase 1 with Quote, Renewal, and Advisor Callback.
Use progressive qualification before requesting unnecessary fields.

prompts.systemBehaviorPrompt: You are APEX for Insurance. Ask contextual questions before requesting contact details. Capture consent before handoff.
prompts.conversationStylePrompt: Keep responses concise, action-oriented, and operationally clear.
prompts.qualificationPrompt: Collect only required fields, update lead score progressively, and stop once threshold is reached.
prompts.fallbackPrompt: If required fields are missing, ask one clarifying question before fallback to callback capture.
prompts.handoffPrompt: Push structured payload to CRM only after consent; prepare WhatsApp continuation if enabled.

openQuestions: Which CRM object and owner assignment logic should be final for Phase 1?
What are approved WhatsApp templates for quote and callback journeys?
Which API contracts are available in client staging environment?
implementationBrief.recommendedNextStep: Review APEX Assist before/after flow with the client, then align on Phase 1 implementation with CRM mapping and compliance sign-off.

friction: Quote and renewal intent may be mixed.
Contact capture likely happens before intent clarity.
Users may face too many fields before understanding product fit.
Advisor callback is not surfaced early enough.
WhatsApp continuation is not used as a structured handoff.
Form-only submission delays CRM-ready qualification.
strategy: Use APEX Overlay as the fastest conversion layer over the native page.
Use APEX Assist to show before/after friction reduction.
Use APEX Page for campaign or microsite journeys.
Start Phase 1 with Quote, Renewal, and Advisor Callback.
Use progressive qualification before requesting unnecessary fields.

pageConfig.heroHeadline: Protect what matters. Get guided insurance help in minutes.
pageConfig.heroSubcopy: Answer 3 questions and get a personalised quote instantly.

projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Assist
experienceModes.description: An embedded native-page assistance layer that demonstrates before/after friction reduction against traditional forms.
experienceModes.bestFor: Comparative demos and incremental rollout over existing pages.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Supports reversible native vs assisted toggle with shared conversation engine.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Front-end embedding and analytics instrumentation
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Show immediate value without replacing current page templates.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

brand.welcomeMessage: Hi, I’m Ava. I can help you get a quote, renew a policy, track a claim, compare plans, or schedule an advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed policy approval
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee policy approval. Final underwriting depends on insurer systems.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Inform user that final approval depends on official checks and offer advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed premium
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee premium amount before insurer validation.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Provide indicative ranges and route user to quote flow.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed claim settlement
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee claim settlement timelines or outcomes.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Route claim disputes or escalations to human advisor.

guardrails.label: Sensitive data limits
guardrails.description: Do not ask for OTP, card PIN, CVV, passwords, or unnecessary sensitive data.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Mask identifiers and ask only required qualification fields.

guardrails.label: Regulated advice escalation
guardrails.description: Do not provide legal, tax, or regulated financial advice.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Escalate to licensed human advisor with context summary.

guardrails.label: Consent before handoff
guardrails.description: Capture explicit consent before CRM or WhatsApp handoff.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: If consent missing, store as partial lead and continue on-site guidance.

integrations.name: Engati CRM
integrations.failureFallback: Queue lead payload and notify sales owner.

integrations.name: WhatsApp Business
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to advisor callback queue.

integrations.name: Salesforce
integrations.failureFallback: Use Engati CRM as default destination.

integrations.name: HubSpot
integrations.failureFallback: Push to Engati CRM and retry HubSpot batch.

integrations.name: Zoho
integrations.failureFallback: Use CSV export and manual import runbook.

integrations.name: Google Sheets
integrations.failureFallback: Buffer rows locally and retry sync.

integrations.name: Custom Webhook
integrations.failureFallback: Retry with exponential backoff and alert owner.

integrations.name: REST API
integrations.failureFallback: Queue payload and notify integration owner.

integrations.name: Calendar / Appointment System
integrations.failureFallback: Collect preferred slot and notify scheduling desk.

integrations.name: Knowledge Base Upload
integrations.failureFallback: Use static fallback answers until content is approved.

integrations.name: Website Content Ingestion
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to manually uploaded URL snapshots.

pageConfig.heroHeadline: Protect what matters. Get guided insurance help in minutes.

projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Assist
experienceModes.description: An embedded native-page assistance layer that demonstrates before/after friction reduction against traditional forms.
experienceModes.bestFor: Comparative demos and incremental rollout over existing pages.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Supports reversible native vs assisted toggle with shared conversation engine.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Front-end embedding and analytics instrumentation
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Show immediate value without replacing current page templates.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

brand.welcomeMessage: Hi, I’m Ava. I can help you get a quote, renew a policy, track a claim, compare plans, or schedule an advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed policy approval
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee policy approval. Final underwriting depends on insurer systems.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Inform user that final approval depends on official checks and offer advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed premium
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee premium amount before insurer validation.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Provide indicative ranges and route user to quote flow.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed claim settlement
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee claim settlement timelines or outcomes.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Route claim disputes or escalations to human advisor.

guardrails.label: Sensitive data limits
guardrails.description: Do not ask for OTP, card PIN, CVV, passwords, or unnecessary sensitive data.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Mask identifiers and ask only required qualification fields.

guardrails.label: Regulated advice escalation
guardrails.description: Do not provide legal, tax, or regulated financial advice.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Escalate to licensed human advisor with context summary.

guardrails.label: Consent before handoff
guardrails.description: Capture explicit consent before CRM or WhatsApp handoff.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: If consent missing, store as partial lead and continue on-site guidance.

integrations.name: Engati CRM
integrations.failureFallback: Queue lead payload and notify sales owner.

integrations.name: WhatsApp Business
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to advisor callback queue.

integrations.name: Salesforce
integrations.failureFallback: Use Engati CRM as default destination.

integrations.name: HubSpot
integrations.failureFallback: Push to Engati CRM and retry HubSpot batch.

integrations.name: Zoho
integrations.failureFallback: Use CSV export and manual import runbook.

integrations.name: Google Sheets
integrations.failureFallback: Buffer rows locally and retry sync.

integrations.name: Custom Webhook
integrations.failureFallback: Retry with exponential backoff and alert owner.

integrations.name: REST API
integrations.failureFallback: Queue payload and notify integration owner.

integrations.name: Calendar / Appointment System
integrations.failureFallback: Collect preferred slot and notify scheduling desk.

integrations.name: Knowledge Base Upload
integrations.failureFallback: Use static fallback answers until content is approved.

integrations.name: Website Content Ingestion
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to manually uploaded URL snapshots.

analyticsEvents.name: demo_opened
analyticsEvents.trigger: User opens generated demo website
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures demo consumption and pre-sales engagement.

analyticsEvents.name: apex_opened
analyticsEvents.trigger: Visitor opens APEX experience from page trigger
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures experience entry by mode and context.

analyticsEvents.name: mode_selected
analyticsEvents.trigger: Demo user switches between Overlay, Assist, and Page modes
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Compares mode value in demos and final recommendations.

analyticsEvents.name: intent_detected
analyticsEvents.trigger: User chooses journey intent or chip
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks intent mix and guides phase prioritization.

analyticsEvents.name: journey_selected
analyticsEvents.trigger: Visitor selects a journey card or assistant suggestion
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks journey demand before implementation.

analyticsEvents.name: journey_started
analyticsEvents.trigger: User answers first contextual journey question
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures journey initiation quality.

analyticsEvents.name: question_answered
analyticsEvents.trigger: Any qualifying question receives a response
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Identifies friction points in qualification flow.

analyticsEvents.name: field_captured
analyticsEvents.trigger: A lead field is captured and validated
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Shows data readiness for CRM handoff.

analyticsEvents.name: lead_score_updated
analyticsEvents.trigger: Score model is recalculated after each step
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Monitors qualification progression.

analyticsEvents.name: qualification_threshold_reached
analyticsEvents.trigger: Lead score reaches or exceeds threshold
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks score-gated conversion readiness.

analyticsEvents.name: consent_captured
analyticsEvents.trigger: User gives explicit consent for CRM or WhatsApp handoff
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Ensures compliant handoff measurement.

analyticsEvents.name: lead_qualified
analyticsEvents.trigger: Required fields plus consent captured and score >= 70
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures conversion from website intent to sales-ready lead.

analyticsEvents.name: crm_push_attempted
analyticsEvents.trigger: System attempts to push structured lead payload
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks integration dependency and payload readiness.

analyticsEvents.name: crm_push_simulated
analyticsEvents.trigger: Simulated CRM push returns success in prototype mode
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Demonstrates expected production handoff behavior.

analyticsEvents.name: whatsapp_handoff_started
analyticsEvents.trigger: Lead qualifies and WhatsApp continuation is prepared
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Tracks continuation channel readiness.

analyticsEvents.name: advisor_callback_requested
analyticsEvents.trigger: User requests a human advisor callback
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Captures high-intent human escalation demand.

analyticsEvents.name: handoff_completed
analyticsEvents.trigger: CRM push and follow-up channel handoff finish
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Confirms end-to-end conversion completion.

analyticsEvents.name: fallback_triggered
analyticsEvents.trigger: Required field missing or confidence falls below threshold
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Shows where qualification flow needs refinement.

analyticsEvents.name: human_handoff_requested
analyticsEvents.trigger: Guardrail or regulated advice trigger escalates to advisor
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Ensures safe escalation path tracking.

analyticsEvents.name: dropoff_detected
analyticsEvents.trigger: User abandons journey before qualification
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Measures conversion leak points in early phases.

analyticsEvents.name: integration_failure_simulated
analyticsEvents.trigger: Simulated push fails and fallback queue path activates
analyticsEvents.businessPurpose: Validates resilience and ownership in production planning.

openQuestions: Which CRM object and owner assignment logic should be final for Phase 1?
What are approved WhatsApp templates for quote and callback journeys?
Which API contracts are available in client staging environment?
implementationBrief.recommendedNextStep: Review APEX Assist before/after flow with the client, then align on Phase 1 implementation with CRM mapping and compliance sign-off.

friction: Quote and renewal intent may be mixed.
Contact capture likely happens before intent clarity.
Users may face too many fields before understanding product fit.
Advisor callback is not surfaced early enough.
WhatsApp continuation is not used as a structured handoff.
Form-only submission delays CRM-ready qualification.
strategy: Use APEX Overlay as the fastest conversion layer over the native page.
Use APEX Assist to show before/after friction reduction.
Use APEX Page for campaign or microsite journeys.
Start Phase 1 with Quote, Renewal, and Advisor Callback.
Use progressive qualification before requesting unnecessary fields.

pageConfig.heroHeadline: Protect what matters. Get guided insurance help in minutes.
pageConfig.heroSubcopy: Answer 3 questions and get a personalised quote instantly.

projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Assist
experienceModes.description: An embedded native-page assistance layer that demonstrates before/after friction reduction against traditional forms.
experienceModes.bestFor: Comparative demos and incremental rollout over existing pages.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Supports reversible native vs assisted toggle with shared conversation engine.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Front-end embedding and analytics instrumentation
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Show immediate value without replacing current page templates.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

pageConfig.heroHeadline: Protect what matters. Get guided insurance help in minutes.
pageConfig.heroSubcopy: Answer 3 questions and get a personalised quote instantly.

projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

fallbackRules: If phone missing, continue journey but mark as partial lead.
If consent missing, do not push to CRM or WhatsApp.
If user asks regulated advice, trigger human handoff.
If API fails, queue lead and notify sales owner.

Ask one clarification question when required field is missing.
If consent missing, keep as partial lead and avoid external handoff.
Trigger advisor callback on repeated confusion.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Assist
experienceModes.description: An embedded native-page assistance layer that demonstrates before/after friction reduction against traditional forms.
experienceModes.bestFor: Comparative demos and incremental rollout over existing pages.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Supports reversible native vs assisted toggle with shared conversation engine.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Front-end embedding and analytics instrumentation
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Show immediate value without replacing current page templates.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

brand.welcomeMessage: Hi, I’m Ava. I can help you get a quote, renew a policy, track a claim, compare plans, or schedule an advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed policy approval
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee policy approval. Final underwriting depends on insurer systems.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Inform user that final approval depends on official checks and offer advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed premium
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee premium amount before insurer validation.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Provide indicative ranges and route user to quote flow.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed claim settlement
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee claim settlement timelines or outcomes.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Route claim disputes or escalations to human advisor.

guardrails.label: Sensitive data limits
guardrails.description: Do not ask for OTP, card PIN, CVV, passwords, or unnecessary sensitive data.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Mask identifiers and ask only required qualification fields.

guardrails.label: Regulated advice escalation
guardrails.description: Do not provide legal, tax, or regulated financial advice.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Escalate to licensed human advisor with context summary.

guardrails.label: Consent before handoff
guardrails.description: Capture explicit consent before CRM or WhatsApp handoff.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: If consent missing, store as partial lead and continue on-site guidance.

integrations.name: Engati CRM
integrations.failureFallback: Queue lead payload and notify sales owner.

integrations.name: WhatsApp Business
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to advisor callback queue.

integrations.name: Salesforce
integrations.failureFallback: Use Engati CRM as default destination.

integrations.name: HubSpot
integrations.failureFallback: Push to Engati CRM and retry HubSpot batch.

integrations.name: Zoho
integrations.failureFallback: Use CSV export and manual import runbook.

integrations.name: Google Sheets
integrations.failureFallback: Buffer rows locally and retry sync.

integrations.name: Custom Webhook
integrations.failureFallback: Retry with exponential backoff and alert owner.

integrations.name: REST API
integrations.failureFallback: Queue payload and notify integration owner.

integrations.name: Calendar / Appointment System
integrations.failureFallback: Collect preferred slot and notify scheduling desk.

integrations.name: Knowledge Base Upload
integrations.failureFallback: Use static fallback answers until content is approved.

integrations.name: Website Content Ingestion
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to manually uploaded URL snapshots.

analyticsEvents.trigger: User chooses journey intent or chip

analyticsEvents.trigger: Visitor selects a journey card or assistant suggestion

openQuestions: Which CRM object and owner assignment logic should be final for Phase 1?
What are approved WhatsApp templates for quote and callback journeys?
Which API contracts are available in client staging environment?
implementationBrief.recommendedNextStep: Review APEX Assist before/after flow with the client, then align on Phase 1 implementation with CRM mapping and compliance sign-off.

friction: Quote and renewal intent may be mixed.
Contact capture likely happens before intent clarity.
Users may face too many fields before understanding product fit.
Advisor callback is not surfaced early enough.
WhatsApp continuation is not used as a structured handoff.
Form-only submission delays CRM-ready qualification.
strategy: Use APEX Overlay as the fastest conversion layer over the native page.
Use APEX Assist to show before/after friction reduction.
Use APEX Page for campaign or microsite journeys.
Start Phase 1 with Quote, Renewal, and Advisor Callback.
Use progressive qualification before requesting unnecessary fields.

pageConfig.heroHeadline: Protect what matters. Get guided insurance help in minutes.
pageConfig.heroSubcopy: Answer 3 questions and get a personalised quote instantly.

projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

openQuestions: Which CRM object and owner assignment logic should be final for Phase 1?
What are approved WhatsApp templates for quote and callback journeys?
Which API contracts are available in client staging environment?

friction: Quote and renewal intent may be mixed.
Contact capture likely happens before intent clarity.
Users may face too many fields before understanding product fit.
Advisor callback is not surfaced early enough.
WhatsApp continuation is not used as a structured handoff.
Form-only submission delays CRM-ready qualification.
strategy: Use APEX Overlay as the fastest conversion layer over the native page.
Use APEX Assist to show before/after friction reduction.
Use APEX Page for campaign or microsite journeys.
Start Phase 1 with Quote, Renewal, and Advisor Callback.
Use progressive qualification before requesting unnecessary fields.

pageConfig.heroHeadline: Protect what matters. Get guided insurance help in minutes.
pageConfig.heroSubcopy: Answer 3 questions and get a personalised quote instantly.

projects.goal: Increase qualified insurance leads and improve quote/renewal completion
projects.targetUserSegment: Retail insurance shoppers and policy renewals

selectedJourneys.name: Get Quote
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants a new insurance quote
selectedJourneys.userProblem: User cannot quickly identify product-fit and gets blocked by long forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Highest commercial intent and strongest path to qualified quote leads.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent is high on quote pages. Progressive qualification improves completion and routing.
sampleConversation: Great choice. What type of insurance are you looking for?
For motor insurance, do you have the vehicle registration number, or prefer make/model/year?
Which city are you in?
Please share the best phone number for quote follow-up.
Can we use this information to continue in CRM and WhatsApp?

selectedJourneys.name: Renew Policy
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants to renew an existing policy
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Returning customers struggle to locate renewal entry points quickly.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: High-intent returning path with strong close-rate potential.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Renewal intent is frequent on policy landing pages and needs fast routing.
qualificationCriteria: Policy number or vehicle registration captured
Renewal due date or status captured
sampleConversation: I can help with renewal. Do you have your policy number or vehicle registration?
What is your renewal due date?
Please share a phone number for renewal confirmation.

selectedJourneys.name: Advisor Callback
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants human help
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Not all users are ready to self-serve, but they still have buying intent.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Captures high-intent leads that otherwise abandon quote forms.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

brand.welcomeMessage: Hi, I’m Ava. I can help you get a quote, renew a policy, track a claim, compare plans, or schedule an advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed policy approval
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee policy approval. Final underwriting depends on insurer systems.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Inform user that final approval depends on official checks and offer advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed premium
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee premium amount before insurer validation.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Provide indicative ranges and route user to quote flow.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed claim settlement
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee claim settlement timelines or outcomes.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Route claim disputes or escalations to human advisor.

guardrails.label: Sensitive data limits
guardrails.description: Do not ask for OTP, card PIN, CVV, passwords, or unnecessary sensitive data.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Mask identifiers and ask only required qualification fields.

guardrails.label: Regulated advice escalation
guardrails.description: Do not provide legal, tax, or regulated financial advice.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Escalate to licensed human advisor with context summary.

guardrails.label: Consent before handoff
guardrails.description: Capture explicit consent before CRM or WhatsApp handoff.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: If consent missing, store as partial lead and continue on-site guidance.

integrations.name: Engati CRM
integrations.failureFallback: Queue lead payload and notify sales owner.

integrations.name: WhatsApp Business
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to advisor callback queue.

integrations.name: Salesforce
integrations.failureFallback: Use Engati CRM as default destination.

integrations.name: HubSpot
integrations.failureFallback: Push to Engati CRM and retry HubSpot batch.

integrations.name: Zoho
integrations.failureFallback: Use CSV export and manual import runbook.

integrations.name: Google Sheets
integrations.failureFallback: Buffer rows locally and retry sync.

integrations.name: Custom Webhook
integrations.failureFallback: Retry with exponential backoff and alert owner.

integrations.name: REST API
integrations.failureFallback: Queue payload and notify integration owner.

integrations.name: Calendar / Appointment System
integrations.failureFallback: Collect preferred slot and notify scheduling desk.

integrations.name: Knowledge Base Upload
integrations.failureFallback: Use static fallback answers until content is approved.

integrations.name: Website Content Ingestion
integrations.failureFallback: Fallback to manually uploaded URL snapshots.

selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Early callback offers recover uncertain users without forcing form completion.
sampleConversation: I can schedule a callback. What should the advisor help you with?
Which time works best for you?

selectedJourneys.name: Track Claim
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants claim status
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users want updates quickly but often lack claim context in one place.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Supports service experience while preserving upsell/cross-sell trust.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Adds post-sale utility and captures service intent for routing.
qualificationCriteria: Claim number or policy number captured
User informed final status depends on insurer systems
guardrails: Never guarantee claim approval or settlement amount
Escalate disputes to official support channel
sampleConversation: I can help track your claim. Please share claim number or policy number.
I will route this to the claim support workflow.

selectedJourneys.name: Compare Plans
selectedJourneys.intent: User is exploring options and wants help choosing
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Users struggle to compare plans without structured guidance.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves early-funnel discovery quality and advisor efficiency.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Intent-first comparison reduces form fatigue and improves product fit.
guardrails: Do not give regulated financial advice
Escalate detailed recommendation request to advisor
sampleConversation: Let us compare options. Which insurance type do you want?
What budget range feels right?
Would you like advisor guidance on shortlisted plans?

selectedJourneys.name: Policy Copy / Document Request
selectedJourneys.intent: User needs policy document, receipt, or certificate
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Document requests are often hidden inside service portals.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves retention and reduces support queue volume.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Low-complexity quick win for post-sale service.
guardrails: Do not expose sensitive account data
sampleConversation: I can help send your policy copy. Which document do you need?
How should we deliver it, SMS or email?

selectedJourneys.name: Add-ons / Riders Discovery
selectedJourneys.intent: User wants add-ons like zero depreciation or riders
selectedJourneys.userProblem: Add-on value is not obvious inside standard quote forms.
selectedJourneys.businessValue: Improves AOV and upsell readiness.
selectedJourneys.whyRecommended: Simple discovery flow increases value without heavy integration.
sampleConversation: Which add-ons are you curious about?
I can route these preferences to an advisor for final recommendation.

experienceModes.name: APEX Overlay
experienceModes.description: A centered guided conversion modal layered over the native website, designed for high-intent journeys.
experienceModes.bestFor: Quote, renewal, and callback journeys where intent needs structured progression.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Opens as 80% viewport modal with blurred backdrop and three-column operational layout.
experienceModes.productionDependency: CRM mapping, consent handling, overlay trigger placement
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Primary mode for enterprise quote and lead qualification flows.

experienceModes.name: APEX Page
experienceModes.description: A generated AI-first landing experience for campaigns and dedicated conversion paths.
experienceModes.bestFor: Campaign traffic, microsites, and product-specific lead funnels.
experienceModes.implementationNotes: Generated branded page with journeys, assistant workspace, and qualification insights.
experienceModes.productionDependency: Page hosting, content governance, SEO/URL strategy
experienceModes.recommendedUseCase: Run high-intent campaigns with guided conversion experiences.

brand.welcomeMessage: Hi, I’m Ava. I can help you get a quote, renew a policy, track a claim, compare plans, or schedule an advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed policy approval
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee policy approval. Final underwriting depends on insurer systems.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Inform user that final approval depends on official checks and offer advisor callback.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed premium
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee premium amount before insurer validation.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Provide indicative ranges and route user to quote flow.

guardrails.label: No guaranteed claim settlement
guardrails.description: Do not guarantee claim settlement timelines or outcomes.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Route claim disputes or escalations to human advisor.

guardrails.label: Sensitive data limits
guardrails.description: Do not ask for OTP, card PIN, CVV, passwords, or unnecessary sensitive data.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Mask identifiers and ask only required qualification fields.

guardrails.label: Regulated advice escalation
guardrails.description: Do not provide legal, tax, or regulated financial advice.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: Escalate to licensed human advisor with context summary.

guardrails.label: Consent before handoff
guardrails.description: Capture explicit consent before CRM or WhatsApp handoff.
guardrails.fallbackBehavior: If consent missing, store as partial lead and continue on-site guidance.

prompts.systemBehaviorPrompt: You are APEX for Insurance. Ask contextual questions before requesting contact details. Capture consent before handoff.

prompts.fallbackPrompt: If required fields are missing, ask one clarifying question before fallback to callback capture.
prompts.handoffPrompt: Push structured payload to CRM only after consent; prepare WhatsApp continuation if enabled.

openQuestions: Which CRM object and owner assignment logic should be final for Phase 1?
What are approved WhatsApp templates for quote and callback journeys?
Which API contracts are available in client staging environment?
implementationBrief.recommendedNextStep: Review APEX Assist before/after flow with the client, then align on Phase 1 implementation with CRM mapping and compliance sign-off.

friction: Quote and renewal intent may be mixed.
Contact capture likely happens before intent clarity.
Users may face too many fields before understanding product fit.
Advisor callback is not surfaced early enough.
WhatsApp continuation is not used as a structured handoff.
Form-only submission delays CRM-ready qualification.
strategy: Use APEX Overlay as the fastest conversion layer over the native page.
Use APEX Assist to show before/after friction reduction.
Use APEX Page for campaign or microsite journeys.
Start Phase 1 with Quote, Renewal, and Advisor Callback.
Use progressive qualification before requesting unnecessary fields.
